issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill contains verbose explanatory text beyond necessary code examples.

scenarios.name: nextjs-streaming-chat
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses groq-sdk with the documented llama-3.3-70b-versatile model and proper delta.content streaming; baseline streams via OpenAI SDK base_url with a guessed model id, missing groq-sdk specificity.

scenarios.name: structured-extraction
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses response_format json_object, temperature 0, and the documented llama-3.1-8b-instant fast model for extraction; baseline relies on parsing raw text with the larger Mixtral model and no JSON mode.
